textPlain: Ever since I've seen the Apollo 11 press conference, I don't know what to think: https://youtu.be/BI_ZehPOMwI
> the solar system’s undisputed heavyweightNow I feel the urge to dispute this!
Aren't NASA considering the proposal to rendez-vous with 3I/ATLAS (aka C/2025 N1 ATLAS)??? [1]1: https://www.sciencealert.com/nasa-probe-could-intercept-inte...
don't be so hard on yourself, there are plenty of low-calorie alternatives nowadays
No, they are not, because the probe doesn't have anywhere near enough fuel to do this. I suggest stopping use of any news source you have that would print this crap.

Nobody at NASA takes anything Avi Loeb says seriously.It also happens that NASA is too busy doing damage control to consider anything new. But even if they were, it won't be because Loeb suggested it.
